svg.text: Minimal Architectures for 12 Ropedia Xperience-10M Tasks
Generated from scripts/episode_task_suite.py semantics and committed summary metrics. These are minimal baselines, not deep foundation models.
logits = z(X)W + b; CE + L2; class weights for classifiers
closed-form dual ridge on z(X), z(Y); used for forecast and reconstruction
project one modality into another feature space, then rank candidates by
sigmoid heads for object vocabulary; threshold 0.5 with top-1 fallback
minimal linear softmax; optional NN MLP
minimal linear softmax; optional NN MLP
minimal linear softmax; optional NN MLP
steady vs transition near action boundary
minimal linear softmax; optional NN MLP
minimal dual ridge; optional NN MLP
minimal linear softmax; optional NN MLP
any body contact in window; degenerate
minimal sigmoid logistic; optional NN MLP
minimal ridge or NN MLP projection, then
text query retrieves matching time window
minimal ridge or NN MLP projection, then
minimal dual ridge; optional NN MLP
minimal binary softmax; optional NN MLP
minimal binary softmax; optional NN MLP
Interpretation: this suite tests whether each input/output contract is wired correctly before scaling to many episodes.
Research-grade claims need held-out episode splits and stronger sequence/vision-language/robot-policy models.
